response: Luigi Cherubini was the composer who wrote his music most recently. He composed "Ali Baba" in 1833, which was his last opera, and his work "Overture in G major" was written in early 1815. Michael Tippett composed "A Child of Our Time" between 1939 and 1941, which was his most notable work. Therefore, Luigi Cherubini wrote his music most recently.
